title: justicia caracasana
intro: Justicia caracasana, also known as Caracas snout butterfly plant or snout flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia caracasana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant and demulcent. Herbal preparations of Justicia caracasana can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat respiratory and digestive issues.
